name: Strawberry Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake pie shell.
2. Soften gelatin in 1/2 cup cold water.
3. Combine limeade concentrate, sugar, and 3/4 cup cold water in a small saucepan; cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the concentrate melts and sugar dissolves.
4. Add softened gelatin; stir until dissolved.
5. Chill until syrupy.
6. Stir in grated lime rind and diced strawberries.
7. Fold in whipped cream until blended; tint pale green with food coloring.
8. Chill until the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon.
9. Place in pie shell; chill 2-3 hours until firm.
10. Garnish with additional sliced strawberries.
Yield: About 6-8 servings.
